api/overview.title: API Overview
api/overview.content:
API Overview
Native executable API reference for Kano Agent Backlog Skill.
Public Contract

scripts/kob - Repo-local launcher for the native CLI
scripts/kano-backlog - Compatibility launcher for the native CLI
kano-backlog native binary - C++ executable command surface

Python import APIs are not a supported public runtime contract for this native milestone.
